name: Chicken with Cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and rub with the seasonings, omitting Fond du monde.
2. Fill the pitted cherries inside of the chicken.
3. Place the chicken in a baking dish and add white wine until the chicken "swims."
4. Bake at 175-200°C for about 1 hour.
5. Mix the juice with Fond du monde, season to taste, and thicken with cornstarch if needed.
6. Serve with spiral noodles.
